error.ancillary_worker_no_result: Ancillary sync worker exited without result
error.ancillary_worker_exit_code: Ancillary sync worker exited with code {{code}}

sync.paused_for_account: Sync paused for this account: {{reason}}. Update account settings or restart app.
sync.paused_credentials: Sync paused: {{message}}. Password or authentication may have changed. Update account settings or restart app.
sync.email_disabled_for_account: Email sync is disabled for this account.
sync.microsoft_no_mailbox_sync_disabled: Microsoft login succeeded, but this account has no Exchange mailbox. Sync was disabled for this account.
sync.microsoft_no_mailbox_signin_succeeded: Microsoft sign-in succeeded, but this account has no Exchange mailbox.
sync.microsoft_email_sync_turned_off: Email sync was turned off automatically: Microsoft sign-in succeeded, but this account has no Exchange mailbox.
sync.contacts_disabled_for_account: Contacts sync is disabled for this account.
sync.calendar_disabled_for_account: Calendar sync is disabled for this account.

error.runtime_dependencies_not_configured: DAV sync runtime dependencies are not configured.
error.oauth_not_supported_use_ancillary: DAV sync does not support OAuth accounts. Use provider ancillary sync service instead.
error.google_oauth_session_missing_calendar_up: Google OAuth session missing for calendar update. Reconnect this account.
error.google_event_id_missing_sync_calendar: Google event id is missing. Please sync calendar and try again.
error.google_oauth_session_missing_calendar_de: Google OAuth session missing for calendar deletion. Reconnect this account.
error.calendar_edit_oauth_provider_not_support: Calendar editing via {{provider}} OAuth is not supported yet.
error.oauth_dav_credentials_required: Calendar and contacts sync via {{providerLabel}} OAuth is not supported yet. Use account/app password DAV credentials for now, or report this on GitHub: https://github.com/wuild/LlamaMail/issues
error.protocol_requires_user_password: {{protocol}} sync requires username and password credentials.
error.no_carddav_endpoint_for_account: No CardDAV endpoint discovered for this account.
error.remote_carddav_contact_not_found_sync_co: Could not locate remote CardDAV contact to update. Please sync contacts and try again.
error.event_end_after_start: Event end must be after start.
error.no_caldav_endpoint_for_account: No CalDAV endpoint discovered for this account.
error.remote_caldav_event_not_found_sync_calen: Could not locate remote CalDAV event to update. Please sync calendar and try again.

error.dependencies_not_configured: OAuth contacts runtime dependencies are not configured.
error.adapter_not_found: OAuth contacts adapter not found for provider: {{provider}}
error.google_contacts_permission_missing: Google contacts permission missing. Reconnect this account and grant Contacts access.
error.oauth_access_token_missing: OAuth access token missing. Reconnect this account.
error.microsoft_access_token_missing_after_ref: Microsoft Graph access token missing after refresh. Reconnect this account.
error.provider_contact_not_cached: Provider contact was created remotely but could not be cached locally.
error.session_missing_update: OAuth session missing for provider contact update. Reconnect this account.
error.session_missing_delete: OAuth session missing for provider contact delete. Reconnect this account.
